nasb.text: and he took food and was strengthened. Now for several days he was with the disciples who were at Damascus,

esv.text: and taking food, he was strengthened. For some days he was with the disciples at Damascus.

cnv.text: 吃過了飯，就有氣力了。 他和大馬士革的門徒一同住了幾天，

ccb.text: 他吃过东西之后，体力也恢复了。他和大马士革的门徒住了几天之后，

csbs.text: 吃过饭，体力就恢复了。 扫罗与在大马士革的门徒们住了几天，
